de.uka.ilkd.key.proof

Class Node

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.Node
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.lang.Iterable<Node>

    public class Node
extends java.lang.Object
implements java.lang.Iterable<Node>

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      Node(Proof proof)
      creates an empty node that is root and leaf.
      Node(Proof proof, Sequent seq)
      creates a node with the given contents
      Node(Proof proof, Sequent seq, Node parent)
      creates a node with the given contents, the given collection of children (all elements must be of class Node) and the given parent node.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void add(Node newChild)
      Makes the given node a child of this node.
      void addAll(Node[] newChildren)
      Makes the given node children of this node.
      void addLocalFunctions(java.util.Collection<? extends Function> elements) 
      void addLocalProgVars(java.lang.Iterable<? extends IProgramVariable> elements) 
      void addNoPosTacletApp(NoPosTacletApp s)
      adds a new NoPosTacletApp to the set of available NoPosTacletApps at this node
      void addStrategyInfoUndoMethod(StrategyInfoUndoMethod undoMethod) 
      Node child(int i) 
      int childrenCount() 
      java.util.Iterator<Node> childrenIterator() 
      void clearNameCache() 
      Node commonAncestor(Node other)
      Search for the root of the smallest subtree containing this and other; we assume that the two nodes are part of the same proof tree
      int countBranches() 
      int countNodes() 
      <T> void deregister(T obj, java.lang.Class<T> service)
      Remove a previous registered user-defined data.
      boolean find(Node node)
      Searches for a given node in the subtree starting with this node.
      RuleApp getAppliedRuleApp() 
      int getChildNr(Node child) 
      java.lang.Iterable<Function> getLocalFunctions()
      Returns the set of freshly created function symbols known to this node.
      java.lang.Iterable<NoPosTacletApp> getLocalIntroducedRules()
      Returns the set of NoPosTacletApps at this node
      ImmutableList<IProgramVariable> getLocalProgVars()
      Returns the set of created program variables known in this node.
      NameRecorder getNameRecorder() 
      NodeInfo getNodeInfo()
      the node information object encapsulates non-logical information of the node, e.g.
      ImmutableList<RenamingTable> getRenamingTable() 
      java.util.List<StrategyInfoUndoMethod> getStrategyInfoUndoMethods() 
      java.lang.StringBuffer getUniqueTacletId() 
      Lookup getUserData()
      Get the assocated lookup of user-defined data.
      boolean isClosed() 
      java.util.Iterator<Node> iterator()
      Returns an iterator over this node's children.
      boolean leaf() 
      java.util.Iterator<Node> leavesIterator() 
      <T> T lookup(java.lang.Class<T> service)
      Retrieves a user-defined data.
      java.lang.String name() 
      Node parent() 
      Proof proof()
      returns the proof the Node belongs to
      <T> void register(T obj, java.lang.Class<T> service)
      Register a user-defined data in this node info.
      boolean root() 
      boolean sanityCheckDoubleLinks()
      Checks if the parent has this node as child and continues recursively with the children of this node.
      Sequent sequent()
      returns the sequent of this node
      int serialNr() 
      void setAppliedRuleApp(RuleApp ruleApp) 
      void setNameRecorder(NameRecorder rec) 
      void setRenamings(ImmutableList<RenamingTable> list) 
      void setSequent(Sequent seq)
      sets the sequent at this node
      int siblingNr()
      Returns the sibling number of this node or -1 if it is the root node

      java.util.Iterator<Node> subtreeIterator()

    • Constructor Detail

      • Node

        public Node(Proof proof)
        creates an empty node that is root and leaf.

      • Node

        public Node(Proof proof,
            Sequent seq)
        creates a node with the given contents

      • Node

        public Node(Proof proof,
            Sequent seq,
            Node parent)
        creates a node with the given contents, the given collection of children (all elements must be of class Node) and the given parent node.

    • Method Detail

      • setSequent

        public void setSequent(Sequent seq)
        sets the sequent at this node

      • sequent

        public Sequent sequent()
        returns the sequent of this node

      • getNodeInfo

        public NodeInfo getNodeInfo()
        the node information object encapsulates non-logical information of the node, e.g.
        Returns:
        the NodeInfo containing non-logical information

      • proof

        public Proof proof()
        returns the proof the Node belongs to

      • setAppliedRuleApp

        public void setAppliedRuleApp(RuleApp ruleApp)

      • clearNameCache

        public void clearNameCache()

      • getNameRecorder

        public NameRecorder getNameRecorder()

      • setNameRecorder

        public void setNameRecorder(NameRecorder rec)

      • setRenamings

        public void setRenamings(ImmutableList<RenamingTable> list)

      • getRenamingTable

        public ImmutableList<RenamingTable> getRenamingTable()

      • getAppliedRuleApp

        public RuleApp getAppliedRuleApp()

      • getLocalIntroducedRules

        public java.lang.Iterable<NoPosTacletApp> getLocalIntroducedRules()
        Returns the set of NoPosTacletApps at this node

      • getLocalProgVars

        public ImmutableList<IProgramVariable> getLocalProgVars()
        Returns the set of created program variables known in this node. In the resulting list, the newest additions come first.

      • addLocalProgVars

        public void addLocalProgVars(java.lang.Iterable<? extends IProgramVariable> elements)

      • getLocalFunctions

        public java.lang.Iterable<Function> getLocalFunctions()
        Returns the set of freshly created function symbols known to this node. In the resulting list, the newest additions come first.
        Returns:
        a non-null immutable list of function symbols.

      • addLocalFunctions

        public void addLocalFunctions(java.util.Collection<? extends Function> elements)

      • addNoPosTacletApp

        public void addNoPosTacletApp(NoPosTacletApp s)
        adds a new NoPosTacletApp to the set of available NoPosTacletApps at this node
        Parameters:
        s - the app to add.

      • parent

        public Node parent()
        Returns:
        the parent node of this node.

      • leaf

        public boolean leaf()
        Returns:
        true iff this node is a leaf, i.e., has no children.

      • find

        public boolean find(Node node)
        Searches for a given node in the subtree starting with this node.
        Returns:
        true iff the node was found.

      • commonAncestor

        public Node commonAncestor(Node other)
        Search for the root of the smallest subtree containing this and other; we assume that the two nodes are part of the same proof tree
        Parameters:
        other - a node.
        Returns:
        the most recent common ancestor of this and the specified node.

      • root

        public boolean root()
        Returns:
        true iff this node is the root, i.e., has no parents.

      • statistics

        public Statistics statistics()

      • add

        public void add(Node newChild)
        Makes the given node a child of this node.
        Parameters:
        newChild - the node to make a child of this node.

      • addAll

        public void addAll(Node[] newChildren)
        Makes the given node children of this node.
        Parameters:
        newChildren - the node to make into children of this node.

      • leavesIterator

        public java.util.Iterator<Node> leavesIterator()
        Returns:
        an iterator for the leaves of the subtree below this node. The computation is called at every call!

      • childrenIterator

        public java.util.Iterator<Node> childrenIterator()
        Returns:
        an iterator for the direct children of this node.

      • subtreeIterator

        public java.util.Iterator<Node> subtreeIterator()
        Returns:
        an iterator for all nodes in the subtree.

      • childrenCount

        public int childrenCount()
        Returns:
        number of children

      • child

        public Node child(int i)
        Parameters:
        i - an index.
        Returns:
        the i-th child of this node.

      • getChildNr

        public int getChildNr(Node child)
        Parameters:
        child - a child of this node.
        Returns:
        the number of the node child, if it is a child of this node (starting with 0), -1 otherwise

      • getUniqueTacletId

        public java.lang.StringBuffer getUniqueTacletId()

      • toString

        public java.lang.String toString()
        Overrides:
        toString in class java.lang.Object

      • name

        public java.lang.String name()

      • sanityCheckDoubleLinks

        public boolean sanityCheckDoubleLinks()
        Checks if the parent has this node as child and continues recursively with the children of this node.
        Returns:
        true iff the parent of this node has this node as child and this condition holds also for the own children.

      • isClosed

        public boolean isClosed()

      • countNodes

        public int countNodes()
        Returns:
        number of nodes in the subtree below this node.

      • countBranches

        public int countBranches()
        Returns:
        number of branches in the subtree below this node.

      • serialNr

        public int serialNr()

      • siblingNr

        public int siblingNr()
        Returns the sibling number of this node or -1 if it is the root node
        Returns:
        the sibling number of this node or -1 if it is the root node

      • getStrategyInfoUndoMethods

        public java.util.List<StrategyInfoUndoMethod> getStrategyInfoUndoMethods()

      • addStrategyInfoUndoMethod

        public void addStrategyInfoUndoMethod(StrategyInfoUndoMethod undoMethod)

      • iterator

        public java.util.Iterator<Node> iterator()
        Returns an iterator over this node's children. Use leavesIterator() if you need to iterate over leaves instead.
        Specified by:
        iterator in interface java.lang.Iterable<Node>
        Returns:
        iterator over children.

      • lookup

        public <T> T lookup(java.lang.Class<T> service)
        Retrieves a user-defined data.
        Type Parameters:
        T - any class
        Parameters:
        service - the class for which the data were registered
        Returns:
        null or the previous data
        See Also:
        register(Object, Class)

      • register

        public <T> void register(T obj,
                         java.lang.Class<T> service)
        Register a user-defined data in this node info.
        Type Parameters:
        T -
        Parameters:
        obj - an object to be registered
        service - the key under it should be registered

      • deregister

        public <T> void deregister(T obj,
                           java.lang.Class<T> service)
        Remove a previous registered user-defined data.
        Type Parameters:
        T - arbitray object
        Parameters:
        obj - registered object
        service - the key under which the data was registered
